# ChatGPT Conversation Exporter

<!-- generated by scripts/generate-positioning.py from positioning-seeds.json · repo: organvm/a-i-chat--exporter -->

A browser userscript that exports your ChatGPT conversations into five portable formats — Markdown, HTML, JSON, PNG, and plain text — entirely in-browser. No account, no server, no data leaves your machine; it authenticates through your existing ChatGPT session and runs on chatgpt.com, chat.openai.com, and new.oaifree.com.

**Built to production weight:** 170 tests across 16 suites · ~5,900 lines of TypeScript · distributed on GreasyFork, GitHub, Docker (GHCR), and Cloudflare Pages · 5 export formats · 9-language UI · MIT-licensed · 549 commits, actively maintained.

**Who this is for:** Researchers, writers, developers, and knowledge workers who live in ChatGPT and need their conversations out — into Obsidian or Notion, a RAG pipeline, version control, or a compliance archive.

**The expensive problem:** ChatGPT conversations are ephemeral by design. There's no native export to Markdown or HTML and no bulk download — the official dump is one unwieldy JSON blob most people can't use. Knowledge you paid for in thinking time evaporates or gets locked in a format you can't pipe anywhere.

**What it costs you to not have this:** Every lost thread is research you have to redo, context you can't feed your tools, and an archive you don't have the day a client, a court, or a coauthor asks for it.

## Ways to work together

Pick the depth that fits. Each level is a deeper build than the last.

| Path | What you get | Cadence |
|------|--------------|---------|
| **1 · Go Pro** (Self-serve) | Bulk export, multi-conversation, and the premium formats — the product, today, no call required. | Self-serve |
| **2 · Run it for my team** (Managed) | We run bulk export across your team's accounts and hand back a clean, organized archive on a recurring basis — your formats, your destinations (Obsidian, Notion, a data lake). | Recurring |
| **3 · Build it into my product** (Custom) | The export engine embedded in your app — your providers (Claude, Gemini), your formats, your branding. The hard part — surviving DOM churn across providers — already solved. | Project + optional retainer |
| **4 · Run my data-portability layer** (Fractional / retainer) | We own the moving-data-out problem across every AI tool your org uses — this exporter, the next provider, the next format — so your knowledge is never trapped. | Ongoing |

## What's open — and what you're buying

**Open:** the entire userscript — every exporter, all 170 tests, the build, the localization. MIT-licensed; fork it, read it, ship it.

**What you're buying:** the maintained Pro build and the keyed bulk pipeline, kept working as ChatGPT's DOM shifts under it — plus the export engine built into your own product or workflow. The script is open; what you pay for is that it keeps working, at scale, the morning OpenAI changes everything.
